description.English: The framework and package this website built on top of. Not going to mention all packages here, only notable ones.
description.Traditional-Chinese: 本網站所基於的框架和函式庫。就不一一列舉所有函式庫了，只介紹幾個比較重要的。

description.English: Flask is a lightweight web application framework. It is designed to make getting started quick and easy, with the ability to scale up to complex applications.
description.Traditional-Chinese: Flask 是一個輕量級的網路應用框架。它的設計宗旨是讓使用者能夠快速輕鬆地入門，同時又能擴展到複雜的應用場景。

description.English: Quickly get a project started with any of our examples ranging from using parts of the framework to custom components and layouts.
description.Traditional-Chinese: 藉助 Bootstrap 的各種範例快速啟動專案，這些範例涵蓋了使用部分的框架、自訂元件和排版等各個方面。

description.English: A container for storing data, allowing users to perform operations such as adding, retrieving, updating, and deleting data within the database.
description.Traditional-Chinese: 儲存數據的容器，使用者可以對資料執行新增、獲取、更新、刪除等操作。

description.English: SQLite is a C-language library that implements a small, fast, self-contained, high-reliability, full-featured, SQL database engine.
description.Traditional-Chinese: SQLite 是一個透過 C 語言函式庫實現的小型、快速、獨立、可靠性高且功能齊全的 SQL 資料庫引擎。

use-case.English: SQLite was used during development to enable rapid iteration.
use-case.Traditional-Chinese: 在開發過程中考量到疊代速度而使用 SQLite。

description.English: PostgreSQL is a powerful, open source object-relational database system that has earned it a strong reputation for reliability, feature robustness, and performance.
description.Traditional-Chinese: PostgreSQL 是一個功能強大的、開源的物件關聯資料庫系統，因其可靠、功能強大和高效能而享有盛譽。

use-case.English: PostgreSQL was used for production due to its reliability.
use-case.Traditional-Chinese: 在生產環境考量到穩定性而使用 PostgreSQL。

description.English: Scalable Vector Graphics (SVG) is a type of image that can be rendered at any size without loss of quality.
description.Traditional-Chinese: SVG 可縮放向量圖形（Scalable Vector Graphics，SVG）是一種可以隨意縮放而不損失品質的向量圖形格式。

description.English: A scalable set of icons handcrafted by GitHub.
description.Traditional-Chinese: GitHub 精心打造的一套可縮放圖示。

description.English: Free, high quality, open source icon library with over 2,000 icons.
description.Traditional-Chinese: 免費、高品質，包含超過 2000 個圖示的開源圖示網站。

use-case.English: The following icons are from this website:
use-case.Traditional-Chinese: 以下圖示均取自此網站：

description.English: Search, explore and edit the best-fitting free icons or vectors for your projects using a wide variety vector library.
description.Traditional-Chinese: 使用種類繁多的向量圖形來搜尋、瀏覽和編輯最適合您專案的免費圖示或向量圖。

use-case.English: The following icons are from this website:
use-case.Traditional-Chinese: 以下圖示均取自此網站：

description.English: The internet's favorite icon library & toolkit.
description.Traditional-Chinese: 網路上最受歡迎的圖示網頁和工具。

description.English: Download Free Icons and Stickers for your projects. Resources made by and for designers.
description.Traditional-Chinese: 下載免費圖示和貼紙用於您的專案。資源由設計師製作，專為設計師設計。

use-case.English: The website icon are from here, created by Freepik - Flaticon.
use-case.Traditional-Chinese: 網站圖示 來自此網頁，由 Freepik - Flaticon 製作。

description.English: SVG is a vector graphics format. SVG images are composed of geometric shapes, and their underlying structure uses various "drawing" instructions. The following tools can alter these instructions.
description.Traditional-Chinese: SVG是一種向量圖形格式。 SVG影像由幾何形狀構成，其底層使用了各種「繪製」指令。以下工具可以修改這些指令。

description.English: Boxy is a vector drawing software that allows you to work efficiently with the vector format using many suitable tools.
description.Traditional-Chinese: Boxy 是一款向量繪圖軟體，它提供了許多合適的工具，讓您能夠有效率地處理向量格式的圖形。

use-case.English: The Switch Language button has two versions and , the latter was created using this website.
use-case.Traditional-Chinese: 切換語言按鈕有兩個版本 和 ，後者是透過此網站建立的。

description.English: SVG Viewer is an online tool to view, edit and optimize SVGs.
description.Traditional-Chinese: SVG Viewer 是一款用於檢視、編輯和優化 SVG 的線上工具。

use-case.English: The icon I created were optimized using this website.
use-case.Traditional-Chinese: 自行建立的圖示 是透過此網站優化的。

description.English: This website convert HEX colors into accurate CSS filters.
description.Traditional-Chinese: 這個網站將十六進制顏色轉換為精確的 CSS 濾鏡。

use-case.English: SVG colors cannot be directly changed using the color CSS property, filter are used here. All changes to the SVG icon colors are generated through this website.
use-case.Traditional-Chinese: SVG 的顏色無法直接使用 CSS 的 color 屬性更改，這裡使用 filter 屬性來變更顏色。所有變更的SVG圖示顏色均透過此網站產生。

description.English: These tools help in generating and selecting colors.
description.Traditional-Chinese: 這些工具能產生或有助於選擇顏色。

description.English: Design color themes based on color theory with our color palette generator. Use color harmonies on the color wheel to generate beautiful color palettes.
description.Traditional-Chinese: 使用色輪建立調色盤，根據色彩理論設計主題。利用色輪上調和的配色，產生美麗的調色盤。

description.English: Extract colors from any image instantly.
description.Traditional-Chinese: 不費時的從任何圖像中提取顏色。

description.English: Color Blender generates color scales by mixing the shades between two colors. Enter a start and end color, and choose the number of blend steps.
description.Traditional-Chinese: Color Blender 透過混合兩種顏色之間的色調來產生多個顏色刻度。輸入起始顏色和結束顏色，並選擇產生的混合刻度數量。

description.English: The beginning and the wingman during the process.
description.Traditional-Chinese: 起始以及過程中的有力助手。

description.English: Beautiful, free images and photos that you can download and use for any project. Better than any royalty free or stock photos.
description.Traditional-Chinese: 精美且免費的圖片和照片，您可以下載並用於任何專案。比任何免版稅圖片或素材資料庫的照片都更勝一籌。

use-case.English: The images from this website all have a link nearby to attribute!
use-case.Traditional-Chinese: 來源於此網站的所有圖片附近都有註明出處！

description.English: See the world of front-end development through my lens. Doing my best to show you how to recreate some awesome stuff from around the web.
description.Traditional-Chinese: 透過我的視角看前端開發的世界。我會盡我所能的向您展示如何重現網路上一些令人驚嘆的作品。

description.English: Stack Overflow is the largest, most trusted online community for developers to learn, share their programming knowledge, and build their careers.
description.Traditional-Chinese: Stack Overflow 是規模最大、最值得信賴的線上開發者社區，開發者可以學習、分享程式設計知識並發展職業生涯。

description.English: The MDN Web Docs site provides information about Open Web technologies including HTML, CSS, and APIs for both Web sites and progressive web apps.
description.Traditional-Chinese: MDN Web Docs 網站提供有關 Open Web 技術的資訊，包括 HTML、CSS 和 API，適用於網站和漸進式網路應用程式。
